CREATE TABLE test_iris (id INTEGER, term VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, term, isIRI(term) AS is_iri FROM test_iris WHERE isIRI(term) = TRUE;
SELECT id, term FROM test_iris WHERE isIRI(term) = FALSE;
SELECT id, term FROM test_iris WHERE term LIKE 'http://%';
SELECT id FROM test_iris WHERE term IN (SELECT term FROM test_iris WHERE isIRI(term) = TRUE);
SELECT a.id, a.term, b.term FROM test_iris AS a JOIN test_iris AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE isIRI(a.term) AND isIRI(b.term);
SELECT id, term FROM (SELECT id, term FROM test_iris WHERE isIRI(term)) AS valid_iris UNION SELECT id, term FROM (SELECT id, term FROM test_iris WHERE NOT isIRI(term));
